Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_12-21-06_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

Implement reproduction logic: dead cells with exactly 3 live neighbors become alive.

Approach: collect all candidate dead cells (neighbors of any live cell that are not themselves live), check each for exactly 3 live neighbors.

Keep all 6 currently-passing tests still green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All 7 tests pass (was 6, now 7). The reproduction test is now green.

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added `isLive` helper, `deadNeighborCandidates` to gather unique dead neighbors of live cells, then filter those with exactly 3 live neighbors and append to survivors.
- **Result**: All tests now pass (7 passing, 2 todo).
- **Approach**: Minimal implementation following the requested approach - collect candidate dead cells (neighbors of live cells, excluding the live ones themselves and dedupe), then check each for exactly 3 live neighbors. Reused existing `countLiveNeighbors`. No premature optimization.

Relevant files:
